title: Can't copy table into another table with constraints (mkey.bulk_rotate_xor_hash)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 (order_number SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, order_id INTEGER NOT NULL, qnt INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE test1 (id INTEGER NOT NULL, qnt INTEGER, order_number INTEGER NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_test1_id PRIMARY KEY (id, qnt), CONSTRAINT fk_order_number FOREIGN KEY (order_number) REFERENCES test2(order_number));
INSERT INTO test1 (id, qnt, order_number) SELECT order_id, qnt, order_number FROM test2 WHERE order_id IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test1 (id, qnt, order_number) SELECT NULLIF(order_id, 1), NULLIF(qnt, 10), order_number FROM test2;
key_bug_features: Copying table data with foreign key constraints
